expectations.evidence: Found 7 issues including: no HTTPS (critical), no proxy headers (high), no WebSocket support, no timeouts, no www handling, no security headers, no per-site logs.
Went beyond 'looks OK' with a P8 owner mindset ('A P8 doesn't say looks fine and walk away'). Identified 7 issues across security, reliability, operability.
Each issue has concrete nginx config fix. Full recommended config provided at the end.
